## Checklist

- [ ] `make test-unit` is green locally
- [ ] Release PRs: `casa-agent/config.yaml` version bumped + a user-facing
      `casa-agent/CHANGELOG.md` entry (merging to master publishes the images
      and creates the tag + GitHub Release automatically)
- [ ] New or changed app options have `translations/en.yaml` entries and
      DOCS.md coverage
- [ ] AI assistance (if any) is disclosed with an `Assisted-by:` commit trailer
